name: Banuba
description: Face AR and video editing SDK for iOS, Android, Web and Unity providing face filters, beautification, avatars and virtual backgrounds.

seo.title: Banuba — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Banuba: Face AR and video editing SDK for iOS, Android, Web and Unity providing face filters, beautification, avatars and virtual backgrounds.

when_to_use: Adding real-time face AR filters to video calling apps
Integrating virtual backgrounds and beautification into iOS/Android
Building try-on experiences for e-commerce with face AR SDK
Adding avatar and gesture-based interactions to Unity games

pros: Feature-rich face AR across four platforms
Used by social and dating apps at scale
cons: Per-MAU licensing can surprise at scale
Integration is heavier than ML Kit
review.verdict: A serious choice when Snap Camera Kit is too opinionated and ML Kit too basic.
review.best_for: Consumer social, dating, and video apps needing polished face AR
review.not_for: Indie apps with low budgets — ML Kit or MediaPipe suffice
